title: HackTheBox: Knife (example)
summary: Exploit the PHP 8.1 dev backdoor header to obtain a shell and escalate with a misconfigured gem binary.

title: VulnHub: Tr0ll 1
summary: Classic enumeration-heavy box: hidden files, wordlist tricks and setuid escalation.

title: TryHackMe: RootMe
summary: Web upload bypass, simple PHP reverse shell and cron-based privilege escalation.

title: HackTheBox: Pikaboo
summary: Pivot through a hidden service using knockd, mount NFS and abuse writable exports.

title: VulnHub: Billu B0x
summary: SQL injection to RCE via LFI and end with a custom SUID binary.

title: VulnHub: Sunset
summary: Abuse PATH hijacking and Linux capabilities to escalate privileges.

title: VulnHub: SickOs 1.1
summary: Shellshock exploitation through CGI, weak passwords and /bin/bash SUID escalation.

title: VulnHub: LinPrivEsc
summary: A training machine to practice common Linux privilege escalation vectors.

title: TryHackMe: Blue
summary: MS17-010 EternalBlue exploitation against Windows 7 with post-exploitation notes.

title: OffSec Proving Grounds: Sneaky
summary: From exposed registry to Docker breakout and root.

title: HackTheBox: Spectra
summary: Enumerate a WordPress multisite, gain shell via config reuse and escalate with sudo -l.

title: VulnHub: BlueTorrent
summary: Chain misconfigurations in a custom torrent service and crack weak crypto for root.
